# Documentation Authority Ranking Fixture

This fixture records exact documentation-intent, ownership, ranking, count,
and pagination examples for Spec 043. Boundary tests generate virtual document
identities from `candidate-boundaries.json`; the fixture deliberately does not
materialize hundreds of filler files.
